---
title: "Figure 1d"
author: "JuHyeongYu"
date: "2026-03-07"
output: html_document
---

```{r}



# 1. Load required packages and data

library(readxl)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(scales)
library(ggpubr)

suppl1_b_raw <- read_excel('/Users/zzuhyeong2/Documents/JoonAhn_Lab/Project1/41467_2024_54434_MOESM5_ESM.xlsx', sheet = 2)

# 2. Data Integration and Preprocessing
suppl1_b_processed <- suppl1_b_raw %>%
  mutate(
    # Mapping raw clinical variables to simplified labels
    clinical_variable = recode(Clinical.variable,
                               "Histology:AD"    = "AD", "Histology:SC" = "SC",
                               "Female"          = "Female", "Smoking:History" = "Smoking",
                               "PathologicN"     = "PathN", "TIL_brisk" = "TIL",
                               "WGD"             = "WGD", "TP53" = "TP53",
                               "TSG"             = "Other tumor suppressor genes",
                               "EGFR(L858R)"     = "EGFR", "EGFR(inframe)" = "EGFR",
                               "OCG_mut"         = "Other oncogenes", 
                               "OCG_amp"         = "Other oncogenes", 
                               "OCG_fus"         = "Other oncogenes"
    ),
    # Pre-calculating percentage and log2(OR)
    percentage_val = `% of Samples in Subtype` * 100,
    log2OR_val = log2(OR),
    Subtype_Label = paste("Subtype", Subtype)
  ) %>%
  # Filter only target clinical variables
  filter(clinical_variable %in% c("AD", "SC", "Female", "Smoking", "PathN", "TIL", 
                                  "TP53", "Other tumor suppressor genes", "EGFR", "Other oncogenes")) %>%
  
  # [Representative Selection Logic] Select the most significant hit (min p-value) per group
  group_by(Subtype_Label, clinical_variable) %>%
  slice_min(order_by = p, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>% 
  ungroup() %>%
  
  # Rename columns to match the visualization script
  rename(
    p_min = p,
    log2OR_avg = log2OR_val,
    percentage = percentage_val
  )

# 3. Final Formatting for Plotting (Applying labels and scaling)
suppl1_b_custom <- suppl1_b_processed %>%
  mutate(
    # Workaround for Histology label with indentation
    display_name = recode(clinical_variable,
                          "AD" = "AD\n \u00A0 \u00A0 \u00A0 \u00A0 \u00A0 \u00A0 \u00A0 Histology",
                          "SC" = "SC",
                          "Female" = "Female",
                          "Smoking" = "\nSmoking",
                          "PathN" = "PathN",
                          "TIL" = "TIL",
                          "TP53" = "TP53",
                          "Other tumor suppressor genes" = "\nOther tumor\nsuppressor\ngenes",
                          "EGFR" = "EGFR",
                          "Other oncogenes" = "\nOther\noncogenes"),
    display_name = factor(display_name, levels = c(
      "AD\n \u00A0 \u00A0 \u00A0 \u00A0 \u00A0 \u00A0 \u00A0 Histology", "SC", "Female", "\nSmoking", "PathN", "TIL", "TP53", 
      "\nOther tumor\nsuppressor\ngenes", "EGFR", "\nOther\noncogenes")),
    Subtype_Label = factor(Subtype_Label, levels = rev(c("Subtype 1", "Subtype 2", "Subtype 3", "Subtype 4", "Subtype 5")))
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    x_num = as.numeric(display_name),
    y_num = as.numeric(Subtype_Label),
    
    # [Significance Cut-off] Color only if p < 0.05
    log2OR_final = case_when(
      p_min < 0.05 & is.infinite(log2OR_avg) & log2OR_avg > 0 ~ 4,
      p_min < 0.05 & is.infinite(log2OR_avg) & log2OR_avg < 0 ~ -4,
      p_min < 0.05 ~ log2OR_avg,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_  
    ),
    
    # Rectangle size scaling
    box_size_x = scales::rescale(percentage, to = c(0.06, 0.34), from = c(0, 100)),
    box_size_y = scales::rescale(percentage, to = c(0.05, 0.26), from = c(0, 100)),
    xmin = x_num - box_size_x, xmax = x_num + box_size_x,
    ymin = y_num - box_size_y, ymax = y_num + box_size_y,
    sig_label = ifelse(p_min < 0.05, "*", "")
  )

# 4. Final Plotting with User-defined Settings
fig1d <- ggplot(suppl1_b_custom) +
  geom_tile(aes(x = display_name, y = Subtype_Label), 
            color = "grey90", fill = "white", lwd = 0.2) +
  geom_rect(aes(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax, 
                fill = log2OR_final), 
            color = "black", linewidth = 0.2) +
  geom_text(aes(x = x_num, y = y_num, label = sig_label), 
            color = "black", size = 5.5, vjust = 0.7, fontface = "bold") +
  geom_point(aes(x = display_name, y = Subtype_Label, size = percentage), alpha = 0) +
  
  coord_fixed(ratio = 1.7) +
  scale_x_discrete(position = "bottom") +
  
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = "#2166CF", mid = "white", high = "#F04E37", 
    midpoint = 0, limits = c(-4, 4), oob = squish,
    na.value = "transparent", 
    name = expression(bold("OR (log"["2"]*")"))) +
  
  scale_size_continuous(
    range = c(1, 7), 
    breaks = c(0, 25, 50, 75),
    limits = c(0, 100),
    name = "Samples (%)") +
  
  theme_pubr() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", face = "plain", size = 12, angle = 0, vjust = 1, lineheight = 0.9),
    axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", face = "plain", size = 13),
    axis.ticks.x = element_line(color = "black"),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.justification = "left", 
    legend.box = "horizontal",
    legend.direction = "horizontal",
    
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 11),
    legend.key.size = unit(1.5, "cm"), 
    legend.spacing.x = unit(0.5, "cm"),
    legend.margin = margin(t = 10, r = 0, b = 10, l = 0),
    
    plot.tag = element_text(size = 25, face = "bold", color = "black"), 
    plot.tag.position = "topleft"
  ) +
  guides(
    fill = guide_colorbar(
      title.position = "top", 
      title.hjust = 0, 
      barwidth = 13, 
      barheight = 2,
      frame.colour = "black", 
      frame.linewidth = 0.5,
      ticks.colour = "black",
      order = 1
    ),
    size = guide_legend(
      title.position = "top", 
      title.hjust = 0, 
      override.aes = list(shape = 22, fill = "white", color = "black", alpha = 1, stroke = 1, size = 8), 
      order = 2
    )
  ) +
  labs(title = NULL, x = NULL, y = NULL)

ggsave("Figure_1d.png", 
       plot = fig1d, 
       width = 14, 
       height = 8, 
       units = "in", 
       dpi = 300)
```
